title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入坦桑尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入坦尚尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Tanzania TBS import conformity, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport, EWURA electricity licensing and grid review, fire safety, 50 Hz operation, and China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与坦桑尼亚 TBS 进口合格评定、IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 证据、UN 38.3 运输、EWURA 电力许可和并网审查、消防安全、50 Hz 运行及中国 GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與坦尚尼亞 TBS 進口合格評定、IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 證據、UN 38.3 運輸、EWURA 電力許可和併網審查、消防安全、50 Hz 運行及中國 GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 基線差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TBS scope determination, EWURA licence or registration decision, grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, owners, and installers should verify current Tanzania standards, PVoC / CoC, electricity, grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TBS适用范围裁定、EWURA许可或登记决定、并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、业主和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行坦桑尼亚标准、PVoC/CoC、电力、并网、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TBS適用範圍裁定、EWURA許可或登記決定、併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、業主和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行坦尚尼亞標準、PVoC/CoC、電力、併網、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Tanzania, first confirm whether each BESS component is regulated by TBS PVoC / CoC or destination inspection, then confirm the IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence requested by TBS, the importer, EWURA, the utility, lender, insurer, or project owner. UN 38.3 transport evidence is separate. EWURA licensing or registration and grid review may apply to storage projects depending on capacity, activity, ownership, and grid connection.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口坦桑尼亚时，应先确认每个BESS部件是否受TBS PVoC/CoC或目的地检验监管，再确认TBS、进口商、EWURA、公用事业单位、贷款方、保险方或项目业主要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据。UN 38.3运输证据是单独要求。储能项目是否需要EWURA许可或登记以及并网审查，取决于容量、活动类型、所有权和并网方式。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口坦尚尼亞時，應先確認每個BESS部件是否受TBS PVoC/CoC或目的地檢驗監管，再確認TBS、進口商、EWURA、公用事業單位、貸款方、保險方或項目業主要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據。UN 38.3運輸證據是單獨要求。儲能項目是否需要EWURA許可或登記以及併網審查，取決於容量、活動類型、所有權和併網方式。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
